steps.title: Identify the slope of line u
steps.content: The equation $y = 2x + 10$ is in slope-intercept form $y = mx + b$, where the coefficient of $x$ is the slope. Therefore, the slope of line $u$ is $m_u = 2$.

steps.title: Use the perpendicular slope rule
steps.content:
When two lines are perpendicular, their slopes are negative reciprocals of each other. If line $u$ has slope 2, the slope of line $w$ is:
$$m_w = -\frac{1}{m_u} = -\frac{1}{2}$$
That matches choice C — C is correct.
